Whenever a source you control deals excess noncombat damage to a creature you don't control, Bobbery deals twice that much damage to that creature's controller.
[i]Bomb [/i]— {3}{R}: Bobbery deals 2 damage to target creature you don't control.

Return each creature card with mana value 3 or less and up to one Hero or Noble card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
Exile this spell.

Enchant creature has myriad. Those tokens aren't legendary.
Stock [i](You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)[/i]

Captive Peach enters under the control of an opponent of your choice.
Captive Peach can't attack or block.
Whenever a creature attacks you, untap it. It gains menace until end of turn.
{5}, Sacrifice Captive Peach: Her owner draws a card and creates two Treasure tokens. Activate only as a sorcery.

Vigilance
Whenever Yoshi Kid enters or attacks, choose a kind of counter at random that he doesn't have on him from among first strike, menace, reach, and trample. Put a counter of that kind on Yoshi Kid. If he has a counter of each of those kinds on him, put two +1/+1 counters on him instead.

Vigilance
Kooper enters with a shield counter on him. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]
When Kooper enters, put a shield counter on each other modified creature you control. [i](Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)[/i]

Whenever another legendary creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Watt.
As long as Watt has three or more counters on her, she has first strike
As long as Watt has six or more counters on her, she has double strike.

As long as Lakilester is attacking, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to other attacking creatures you control.
At the beginning of each end step, if damage was prevented this turn, create two 1/1 red Turtle Egg creature tokens with “This token can't block”
This token can't block.

Flying
Whenever Tippi or another legendary permanent you control enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

Reach
Whenever you sacrifice an enchantment, Mallow deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life.
{2}{R}{G}, Sacrifice an Aura with mana value 1 or greater: Discover X, where X is that Aura's mana value. Activate only as a sorcery.

Haste
[i]Shooting Star Shot — [/i]Whenever Geno attacks for the first time each turn, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Then if you control three or more attacking enchanted creatures, untap all attacking creatures. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

Whenever Mario attacks, create a tapped Treasure token for each Aura attached to him.
Partner—Cross Heroes [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

Whenever an Aura enters attached to Luigi, you may create a token that's a copy of it attached to another target legendary creature you control.
Partner—Cross Heroes [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

[i]Clay Shooting [/i]— Whenever one or more commanders you control attack, Duck Hunt Duo deals 2 damage to each defending player. Create a Treasure token for each player dealt damage this way.
Partner—Cross Heroes [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

[i]Veil — [/i]At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn.
[i]Fiery Hex[/i] — During your turn, double all damage commanders you control would deal to your opponents and to permanents your opponents control.

Enchant legendary creature you control
Auras you control have hexproof and indestructible.
Enchanted creature gets +10/+10 and can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

As Super Princess Peach enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, choose one. Peach and each enchanted creature you control have the last chosen ability.
• [i]Joy[/i] — Flying
• [i]Rage [/i]— First strike
• [i]Gloom [/i]— Deathtouch
• [i]Calm [/i]— Lifelink

Flying
Untap each enchanted permanent you control during each opponent's untap step.
Whenever you attack, for each defending player, tap target creature that player controls.

When Tayce T. enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a Food token.
Whenever you gain life, create a Super token attached to up to one target creature you control. [i](It's a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and “Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.”)[/i]

This spell can't be countered
Trample, haste
Whenever DK & Diddy attacks, double each other attacking creature's power until end of turn.

Menace
Whenever Paper Mario attacks, you may exert him. When you do, copy up to two other triggered abilities you control. You may choose new targets for those abilities. [i](An exerted creature won't untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Enchant creature or Vehicle
Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has ward {2} and “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create that many Treasure tokens.”

This spell can't be countered.
Permanent spells you control can't be countered.
{T}: Add {G}.
{3}{G}, {T}: Whenever an enchanted creature you control deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw a card.

Enchant creature
When this aura enters, create X 1/1 white Performer creature tokens.
Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control.

Indestructible
When this creature enters, clear a stage for each creature you control with power 4 or greater. [i](When you clear a stage, draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world. Draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)[/i]

Enchant land you control
As this Aura enters, choose a color.
Untap enchanted land during each opponent's untap step.
Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, add one mana of the chosen color.

Choose three. You can choose the same mode more than once.
• Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Destroy target enchantment.

Starshroom gets +1/+0 for each other creature and/or enchantment you control.

At the beginning of your end step, return target Aura card from your graveyard to your hand if you attacked with a commander this turn.

This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is its target's power.
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature has base power 6 and has trample and lifelink.

All creatures can attack your opponents as though those creatures had haste.
Creatures that entered this turn and that aren't attacking you get +1/+0 and have trample.

Flying
Whenever you cast an enchantment spell with mana value greater than this creature's power, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, draw a card, then you can put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

Menace
Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.
Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on Daisy.

Whenever you cast an Aura spell, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal an Aura card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

Each commander creature you control gets +X/+0 and gain first strike and haste until end of turn.
